PRIX VERSAILLES WORLD CEREMONY

4 December 2025 | Paris, UNESCO

2025 Laureates

A PRIX VERSAILLES INITIATIVE:

RECOGNISING THE вАЬWORLD'S MOST BEAUTIFULвАЭ ACHIEVEMENTS

The "World's Most BeautifulвАЭ Achievements recognition, granted by the Prix Versailles, highlights the primary role of the Laureates in beautifying and improving the living environment.

These achievements, awarded each year by the Prix Versailles, are examples presented to the world, signs of exceptional architecture and design.

#BeautyEverywhere

About

ABOUT THE PRIX VERSAILLES

Architecture and intelligent sustainability

Announced each year at UNESCO since 2015, the Prix Versailles is a series of architectural competitions that shine a light on the finest contemporary projects worldwide.

At the intersection between multiple disciplines, the members of the Prix Versailles World Jury are tasked with awarding twenty-four World Titles from among the Selected Sites вАУ in the categories of Airports, Campuses, Passenger Stations, Sports, Museums, Emporiums, Hotels and Restaurants.

The Official List вАУ which pays tribute to innovation, creativity, reflections of local heritage, ecological efficiency and the values of social interaction and participation, which the United Nations holds in high regard вАУ is in line with the principles of intelligent sustainability, taking the projectsвАЩ ecological, social and cultural impacts into consideration.

вАЬDialogue and interconnections between the different aspects of the human environment вАУ from ecology to social relations to culture вАУ pave the way for intelligent sustainable development.
More than a mere goal, this offers a wonderful promise of the ability to meet the latest challenges facing the world today.вАЭ

J√©r√іme Gouadain
Secretary General of the Prix Versailles

International Appeal

INTERNATIONAL APPEAL

TOWARDS A CULTURAL RENAISSANCE OF THE ECONOMY

June 2020

вАЛ

With the Prix Versailles, architects, chefs, Nobel laureates in Economics, heads of international organisations call for a cultural renaissance of the economy.

вАЬArchitecture and design can help to reinvent an urbanized world which espouses ecology, sociability and beauty.вАЭ
